corrections.note: Name in heading sentence reads Ὀνείας before Ἄρης βασιλεύς.
Printed form appears with omicron; likely no real issue beyond font, so low confidence.
Verb on page is ἔταξεν, not ἔπαξεν.
Transcript has stray Latin o and wrong accenting; page reads unaccented Ἀσκαλωνος.
Manuscript siglum misread as Greek xi.

corrections.note: Printed variant appears to read πολεμησαι V, not πορευηναι V.
A reading is singular κατεδιωξεν, not plural κατεδιωξαν.

uncertain.note: The omicron in γράφομεν is visually normal; no correction may be needed beyond exact Unicode form. Included above with low confidence.
Variant after πολεμησαι is small; appears to be πολεμησαι V rather than πορευηναι V, but image is less sharp here.

notes: Page number 646 at foot was correctly not treated as body text. Marginal handwritten marks are present in image but not part of printed transcription target.
